The contacts wife owns a 2017 Mini Cooper Countryman. The contact stated that on multiple occasions, the vehicle stalled while refueling. The contact stated that the vehicle made abnormal sounds while restarting, and often took 30-seconds to start operating normally. Additionally

narrative.headline: What 2017 Mini Countryman owners report most
narrative.summary: Across 7 owner complaints to NHTSA, the most reported area is Electrical System (29% of reports). Some reports involve a fire or crash — read the details below.
